title: Lusail Stadium Bubble Response
description: Structured output contract for the Gemma 4 on-device model. The model returns 2–3 floating action bubbles in response to a scan context.

Bubble.description: A single floating action bubble presented to the user in the stadium companion app.

label.description: Short, user-facing action label. Localized to the user's language (Arabic or English). Must fit in a compact floating bubble UI.

icon.description: Single emoji character (may include skin-tone modifiers, variation selector, or ZWJ sequences). Rendered as the bubble's primary icon.

agent.description: Routing key that determines which local agent handler processes this action when the user taps the bubble.

payload.description: Action-specific parameters. Schema varies by agent type. See the corresponding $defs entry for the exact contract.

PaymentPayload.description: Payload for the 'payment' agent. Triggers the payment/checkout flow.

amount.description: Pre-filled payment amount in the given currency. Omit if amount is variable (e.g., full menu order).

merchant.description: Merchant identifier — concession stand name, parking zone, hospitality upgrade title, etc.

currency.description: Currency code. Lusail Stadium only processes payments in Qatari Riyal.

tap_to_pay.description: If true, the payment sheet opens directly to the NFC/contactless prompt (Apple Pay, Google Wallet, contactless card).

NavigatePayload.description: Payload for the 'navigate' agent. Triggers indoor/outdoor wayfinding to a destination.

destination.description: Human-readable destination name. Examples: 'Gate 2', 'Section 134', 'Merchandise Megastore', 'Lusail QNB Metro Station'.

distance_m.description: Approximate straight-line distance from the scan point to the destination, in meters.

level.description: Destination level. 0 = outside/grounds, 1 = Lower Tier concourse, 2 = Upper Tier concourse, 3 = VIP/Hospitality.

landmarks.description: Ordered waypoint landmarks to guide the user en route. Displayed as turn-by-turn cues.

FoodPayload.description: Payload for the 'food' agent. Triggers the food ordering and pickup flow.

concession.description: Concession zone code. A=Al-Sadd Kitchen, B=Champions Grill, C=Spice Market, D=Mediterraneo, E=Falafel Oasis, F=Quick Bites, G=The Brew Stand, H=Hospitality Pantry.

menu_url.description: Deep-link path or URL to the concession's digital menu. Null if not available.

wait_min.description: Estimated wait time in minutes. Null if unknown or not applicable (e.g., hospitality catering).

pickup_section.description: Nearest section number to the food pickup counter. Null if pickup is at-suite or not relevant.

InfoPayload.description: Payload for the 'info' agent. Displays an information card or FAQ answer.

topic.description: Short topic tag for the info card. Examples: 'shuttle_status', 'match_countdown', 'wifi_setup', 'nearby_concessions'.

body.description: Concise answer or information (1–2 sentences) rendered immediately in the bubble expansion or info card.

deep_link.description: App route for more detail. Null if the body is self-contained.

AccessibilityPayload.description: Payload for the 'accessibility' agent. Triggers accessibility service requests or information.

location.description: Where the user should go or where the service is located.

staff_alert.description: If true, dispatch a notification to stadium accessibility staff to assist the fan.

EntertainmentPayload.description: Payload for the 'entertainment' agent. Triggers fan engagement content.

title.description: Display title for the entertainment content.

url.description: Content URL or deep-link path. Null if the content is generated client-side.

FormPayload.description: Payload for the 'form' agent. Auto-fills a web form (Google Form, registration, survey) using the user profile.

url.description: The form URL from the QR scan payload.

prefill.description: Field-to-value mappings for form pre-fill. Keys are common form field names, values come from the user profile.
